user.title: Sundance Spa
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Spa WiFi adapter (Elfin-EW11A or similar).

data_description.host: The IP address of your WiFi adapter
data_description.port: The TCP port (default: 8899 for Elfin, 4257 for Balboa WiFi)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the spa. Please check the IP address and port, and ensure the spa is powered on.
